SAI VENKAT KONAPARTHI
+91 9346381319 | konaparthi.saivenkat@gmail.com | LinkedIn: konaparthi-saivenkat | GitHub: saivenkat220504
CAREER OBJECTIVE
Computer Science undergraduate with strong foundations in full-stack development and data structures, experienced in
building scalable web applications and AI-powered systems. Seeking to apply problem-solving and software engineering
skills to real-world challenges.
EDUCATION
VNR Vignana Jyothi Institute of Engineering and Technology
2023–2027
Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science)
CGPA: 8.25/10.0
New Vision Junior College
2021–2023
Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education
Marks: 975/1000
TECHNICAL SKILLS
• Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, C++, SQL
• Frameworks & Web Technologies: React.js, Express.js, HTML, CSS
• Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB
• Data Analysis & Visualization: Pandas, NumPy, Power BI
• Core Concepts: Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Machine Learning, Agentic AI
PROJECTS
Student Assistant Agentic AI | LangGraph, FastAPI, MCP, PostgreSQL
• Architected an autonomous AI agent using LangGraph and FastAPI to orchestrate complex multi-step reasoning loops.
• Integrated custom Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers as background subprocesses for secure, context-aware exe-
cution.
• Engineered a hybrid RAG architecture with isolated FAISS vector indices to eliminate AI hallucinations.
• Implemented a resilient dual-write PostgreSQL replication strategy ensuring high availability and offline fallback.
ChainMind: Agentic AI Supply Chain Risk Intelligence | Python, FastAPI, Next.js
• Built a 5-stage agentic AI pipeline to predict supply chain disruptions and optimize freight routes.
• Engineered parallel risk agents and ran Monte Carlo simulations to model logistics network ripple effects.
• Designed a route decision engine using QUBO binary optimization and Game Theory for risk-adjusted planning.
• Developed a Next.js 3D dashboard featuring live map tracking and an embedded, context-aware LLM Copilot.
Campus Pocket: AI-Driven EdTech Portal | Flutter, FastAPI, Supabase, RAG
• Designed a Python/FastAPI backend with LangChain and GPT-40-mini, creating a real-time RAG pipeline.
• Architected a cross-platform Flutter and Supabase app with role-based dashboards for academic tracking.
• Implemented an Academic Risk Prediction algorithm combining attendance and grade trends for proactive interven-
tions.
• Enforced strict data privacy via custom Supabase Row-Level Security (RLS) policies and PostgreSQL triggers.
Traffic Sign Recognition System | ResNet, ONNX, Flask, Docker
• Engineered a custom ResNet model with CBAM attention for 43-class traffic sign recognition (∼97% accuracy).
• Implemented Grad-CAM Explainable AI and optimized real-time webcam inference for <100ms CPU latency.
• Deployed a production ONNX model server using Flask and a Java Spring Boot API gateway via Docker Compose.
• Built an end-to-end MLOps pipeline featuring Pytest suites and Prometheus endpoint monitoring.
RESEARCH, PATENTS & ACHIEVEMENTS
• Patent Published:
Agentic AI-Driven Knowledge Assistance System | Indian Patent Office (App No:
202641084426 A)
• Invented an AI educational assistant powered by a graph-based agent controller, orchestrating hybrid multi-source
reasoning via RAG, real-time web search, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool execution.
• Engineered end-to-end multimodal input processing (vision-language, speech, OCR) with bounded memory manage-
ment, integrating an adaptive framework for automated examination and interactive assessment.
• Publication (Accepted): “Agentic AI Architecture for Personalized Student Assistance” — First International
Conference on Nexus of Digitalization, Intelligence and Applications (IEEE ICNDIA 2026).
• Hackathons & Tech: Participated in Web Hackathon by IIT Bhubaneswar (2025); Technical Member at VJ Data
Questers.
